item.title: “[eslint] 删除 `CR` [更漂亮/更漂亮]” | "[eslint] Delete `CR` [prettier/prettier]"
item.description:
如果您收到错误，一个简单的解决方案是向您的 . 对象“规则”下的eslintrc.js如下“
'prettier/prettier' : ['error', { 'endOfLine': 'auto'

一旦暂停，hamidtips 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，hamidtips 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，hamidtips 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 hamidtips 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 hamidtips 的方法：

使 hamidtips 的所有帖子不那么显眼

报告其他不当行为

Unflagging hamidtips will restore default visibility to their posts. Unflagning hamidtips 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

If you are getting the error, an easy solution is to add an exception to your .eslintrc.js under object "rules" as following"
'prettier/prettier' : ['error', { 'endOfLine': 'auto'

}]

Micael Levi L. C. - Feb 5

Once suspended, hamidtips will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, hamidtips will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by hamidtips will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If hamidtips is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag hamidtips:

Make all posts by hamidtips less visible

hamidtips consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging hamidtips will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: hamidtips
